summary: Extended release provenance so MARKETING_VERSION is checked against the committed project.pbxproj at HEAD alongside CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION. The verifier now prints committed marketing-version state, fails --require-clean for uncommitted app-version bumps, and keeps advisory informational output when --require-clean is not used. Release/pre-push messaging and workflow docs now name both app-version and build-number provenance gates.
validations_passed: git fetch origin main && git pull --rebase origin main
missing_proof_levels: No app behavior, archive upload, TestFlight install, App Store Connect, or MDM rollout behavior was changed or claimed.

contract_status_changes.before: verify-build-provenance reported MARKETING_VERSION but only compared CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION against the committed HEAD project file.
contract_status_changes.after: verify-build-provenance reports committed MARKETING_VERSION state, treats MARKETING_VERSION drift as advisory in informational mode, and fails --require-clean when MARKETING_VERSION differs from HEAD.

contract_status_changes.before: pre-push, release-preflight, release.md, and validation.md described the committed-HEAD gate mostly as a build-number check.
contract_status_changes.after: operator-facing release messages and docs now state that both MARKETING_VERSION and CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION must match committed HEAD before Archive/release provenance is accepted.

contract_status_changes.before: app-runtime.md named MARKETING_VERSION committed-HEAD enforcement as a remaining gap.
contract_status_changes.after: app-runtime.md now records committed-HEAD checks for MARKETING_VERSION and CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION as implemented, with widget/reminder parity proof still deferred.

residual_risks: The queued release-bump-version-policy-guard slice still needs to harden and test the bump-version tooling itself.

./Tools/verify-build-provenance.sh was run before commit, so it reported the working tree as dirty while still proving the new committed marketing-version output shape. Pre-push provenance checks rerun after commit/push from a clean tree.
recommended_next_reason: It is the remaining queued release implementation slice after the policy doc and MARKETING_VERSION provenance gate are complete.
